question:
Jompuses are not small. Jompuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are not kind. Each tumpus is a vumpus. Vumpuses are metallic. Vumpuses are numpuses. Each numpus is fruity. Each numpus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are nervous. Dumpuses are rompuses. Each rompus is opaque. Every wumpus is dull. Each rompus is a zumpus. Each zumpus is hot. Every zumpus is an impus. Every impus is not dull. Each impus is a yumpus. Sam is a numpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is not dull.
